atomic_facts.fact: A document titled 'ANNOUNCEMENT' is visible.
The document mentions 'FC Barcelona Board of Directors' and an agreement for salary reduction due to 'Covid-19'.
The text specifies a salary reduction of 'over 70%' for the football first team.
The document is dated 'Barcelona, 30 March 2020' at the bottom.
The word 'BARCELONA' is partially visible at the top of the document.

ocr: The FC Barcelona Board of Directors, the members of all of the professional sports teams and most of the basketball team have reached an agreement for a reduction in their salaries during the period of the state of alarm caused by Covid-19.

In the case of the football first team, the reduction will be over 70% of that originally agreed with the Club. This additional contribution by the team, together with the contribution that the Club itself shall make, will guarantee 100% of the salaries of all non-sporting staff at the Club, which will be submitted for ERTE (temporary redundancy) this week.
The Club wishes to express its gratitude to all of the professional athletes for their commitment during such an exceptional situation that has been caused by this health crisis.

state_changes: Scene shifts to Number 1 graphic with white document, letters removed

Red rectangular graphic with white lines resembling a soccer tactics board

atomic_facts.fact: The video shows a transition from a segment labeled '2' to a segment labeled '3'.
The text document mentions a '70%' salary reduction ('rebaja de un 70%').
The text ends with the phrase 'Visca el Barça i visca Catalunya!'.
The text mentions employees receiving '100%' of their salary ('cobrar el 100% de su sueldo').
The graphic behind the number 3 depicts a soccer pitch layout.

ocr: Antes de nada, queremos aclarar que nuestra voluntad siempre ha sido aplicar una bajada del sueldo que percibimos...
...rebaja de un 70% de nuestro sueldo durante el Estado de Alarma...
...empleados del club puedan cobrar el 100% de su sueldo...
Si no hablamos hasta ahora fue porque lo prioritario para nosotros era encontrar soluciones...
No queremos despedirnos sin enviar un afectuoso saludo...
Visca el Barça i visca Catalunya!
spatial: The first frame features a split layout with a large number '2' and blurred stadium background on the left, and a legible text document on the right. The second frame shifts to a dark background with a large number '3' in the foreground left and a red tactics board graphic behind it.
